name: bettercallclaude-espana
description: Spain Legal Intelligence -- TS/AP/STS/STC precedent research, case strategy, legal drafting, and citation verification across all 17 Autonomous Communities with secreto profesional privacy protection.

default_jurisdiction.title: Default Spanish Autonomous Community
default_jurisdiction.description: Default Spanish Autonomous Community code for autonomic research (e.g. MD, CT, AN, PV, GA). Leave blank for state-level only queries.

output_language.title: Output language
output_language.description: Preferred output language for agents and drafter output. One of: ES, EN.

api_token.title: MCP gateway API token (optional)
api_token.description: Optional bearer token for accessing a protected BetterCallClaude España MCP deployment. Leave blank for the public service.

privacy_mode.title: Privacy mode
privacy_mode.description: Privacy routing mode: strict (same pattern matching as balanced but blocks instead of prompting -- non-privileged content passes through, only Ollama exempt from all checks), balanced (prompt on privilege markers), or cloud (prompt on strong markers only, weak signals pass through).
